description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and runs a before_script installing make, curl, util-linux, and git with `apk add --no-cache make curl util-linux git` and then prints the versions via `make --version` and `git --version`. Define two stages, test and deploy. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, executes `make all DEPLOY=test VERBOSE=1`, and publishes the `test` directory as an artifact. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes `make all DEPLOY=public`, and publishes the `public` directory as an artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch, while the test job runs on all branches.
